birdJournal.description: Polls iNaturalist for birds recently spotted near you. Every new species gets a field-journal plate drawn by OpenAI from licensed reference photos, verified for accuracy, and saved to the asset collection. Cycles through the collection on each render.

fields.hint: Center of the observation circle. Leave empty to pause the journal.
fields.label: Latitude
fields.name: latitude

fields.hint: Only sightings observed within this many days count.
fields.label: Time window (days)
fields.name: daysWindow

fields.hint: How often to ask iNaturalist for new sightings.
fields.label: Poll every (minutes)
fields.name: pollMinutes

fields.label: Plate style
fields.name: style
fields.value: A 19th-century naturalist's field-journal plate on lightly aged cream paper: fine ink linework with soft watercolor washes. The bird perches on a small branch or stands in typical habitat, anatomically accurate. Around it, small pencil detail studies (head, wing or feather) and short handwritten-style margin notes. Neatly hand-lettered at the bottom: the common name in larger letters and the scientific name in italics beneath it.

fields.hint: Responses API model that drives image generation and the accuracy check
fields.label: OpenAI model
fields.name: model

fields.hint: Have the model double-check each plate against a reference photo before adding it
fields.label: Verify plates
fields.name: verifyPlates

fields.hint: Least recently seen species (and their plates) are pruned beyond this
fields.label: Max species kept
fields.name: maxSpecies

fields.hint: Plates are saved under this folder in the frame's assets directory
fields.label: Asset folder
fields.name: assetFolder

fields.hint: Scene state key holding the species log; persist it to disk in scene fields
fields.label: Journal state key
fields.name: journalStateKey

fields.hint: Scene state key that receives the caption / status line for a text overlay
fields.label: Caption state key
fields.name: captionStateKey

birdJournal.name: Bird field journal (JS)
